name: R-5 react-component-build skill: SKILL.md references the four R-3 detectors so the skill's cost-benefit is auditable
command: for d in a11y-axe bundle-budget rsc-boundary exhaustive-deps; do grep -q "$d" "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/skills/react-component-build/SKILL.md" || { echo missing 1>&2; exit 1; }; done && echo detectors_cited 1>&2
